nasb.text: You will arise and have compassion on Zion; For it is time to be gracious to her, For the appointed time has come.

esv.text: You will arise and have pity on Zion; it is the time to favor her; the appointed time has come.

cnv.text: 你要起來，憐憫錫安， 因為現在是恩待錫安的時候； 所定的日期已經到了。

ccb.text: 你必怜悯锡安， 因为现在是你恩待她的时候了，时候到了。

csbs.text: 你必起来怜悯锡安， 因为这是恩待她的时候， 又因为所定的时期已经来到。
